# ai-apps samples

> Runnable samples and reference scenarios for building AI-native applications
> on Azure Container Apps. Five pillars: sandboxes, apps, connectors, triggers,
> and ai-app-workloads (cross-pillar). Every sample is self-contained — `cd`
> into a folder, install its requirements.txt, run.

See [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) for idioms and conventions when generating code
that uses these samples.

## Setup (run once per pillar)

- [Sandboxes setup](sandboxes/setup/README.md): Provisions resource group +
  sandbox group + RBAC. Run with `python setup.py`. Writes `samples/.env`.

## Sandboxes — guides (one capability per script)

- [01-getting-started](sandboxes/guides/01-getting-started/README.md):
  Create a sandbox, run a shell command, delete the sandbox. Python + CLI.
- [02-files](sandboxes/guides/02-files/README.md):
  `write_file` / `read_file` / `stat_file` / `list_files` / `mkdir` / `delete_file`. Python + CLI.
- [03-ports](sandboxes/guides/03-ports/README.md):
  `add_port(anonymous=True)`, fetch the public URL, `remove_port`. Python + CLI.
- [04-snapshots](sandboxes/guides/04-snapshots/README.md):
  `create_snapshot`, boot a new sandbox from the snapshot, verify state preserved. Python + CLI.
- [05-egress](sandboxes/guides/05-egress/README.md):
  `set_egress_default("Deny")` + `add_egress_host_rule` to lock down outbound network. Python + CLI.
- [06-secrets](sandboxes/guides/06-secrets/README.md):
  Group-scoped secrets — `upsert_secret` / `list_secrets` / `peek_secret` / `delete_secret`. Python + CLI.
- [07-volumes](sandboxes/guides/07-volumes/README.md):
  Shared AzureBlob volumes — producer writes, consumer reads, via `add_volume_mount`. Python + CLI.
- [08-labels](sandboxes/guides/08-labels/README.md):
  `labels=` on `begin_create_sandbox` + `list_sandboxes(labels=…)` to query by tenant/role. Python + CLI.
- [09-lifecycle](sandboxes/guides/09-lifecycle/README.md):
  `stop` / `resume` / `wait_for_running` / `ensure_running` + `AutoSuspendPolicy` + `AutoDeletePolicy`. Python + CLI.
- [10-custom-disks](sandboxes/guides/10-custom-disks/README.md):
  `begin_create_disk_image` from a public OCI image, boot a sandbox from it. Python + CLI.
- [11-commit-to-disk](sandboxes/guides/11-commit-to-disk/README.md):
  `sandbox.begin_commit(name=…)` freezes a primed sandbox into a reusable disk image. Python + CLI.
- [12-async](sandboxes/guides/12-async/README.md):
  `azure.containerapps.sandbox.aio` + `asyncio.gather` for concurrent operations. Python only.
- [13-managed-identity](sandboxes/guides/13-managed-identity/README.md):
  SystemAssigned identity on a sandbox group — foundation for agent inception. Python + CLI.

## Sandboxes — scenarios (composed use cases)

- [web-app-deployment](sandboxes/scenarios/web-app-deployment/README.md):
  Upload a Node.js HTTP server, start it, expose port 8080 publicly,
  fetch from your laptop. Composes files + exec + ports. Python + CLI.
- [parallel-fan-out](sandboxes/scenarios/parallel-fan-out/README.md):
  Run the same task on N sandboxes concurrently via the async SDK +
  `asyncio.gather`. Python only.
- [agent-swarm](sandboxes/scenarios/agent-swarm/README.md):
  Orchestrator dispatches mapper + reducer roles across a swarm of
  sandboxes (MapReduce-shaped). Python only.

## Apps

Coming in Phase 4. See [apps/README.md](apps/README.md).

## Connectors

Coming in Phase 6. See [connectors/README.md](connectors/README.md).

## AI app workloads

Coming in Phase 8. See [ai-app-workloads/README.md](ai-app-workloads/README.md).

- [Azure Container Apps Python SDK (Early Access)](https://github.com/microsoft/azure-container-apps/blob/main/docs/early/python-sdk/README.md)
- [ACA CLI (Early Access)](https://github.com/microsoft/azure-container-apps/blob/main/docs/early/aca-cli/README.md)
